label: Smart Pak
blurb: Developer & IT Operations. Engineering velocity and uptime.

skills.label: Pr Summary And Impact
skills.method: Reads Git diff, writes plain-English summary, lists files impacted, flags breaking API changes.

skills.label: Dependency Vuln Patcher
skills.method: Reads Dependabot alerts, checks breaking changes in package changelogs, opens fixed PR.
trigger_examples: keeps software secure without burning dev hours

skills.label: Unit Test Edge Case
skills.method: Reads a function, generates Jest/PyTest suites specifically targeting nulls, negatives, and overflows.

skills.label: Legacy Code Documenter
skills.method: Reads undocumented 10-year-old Python/Java, generates JSDoc/Sphinx comments for every function.
trigger_examples: unblocks teams stuck maintaining old code

skills.label: React Component Isolator
skills.method: Takes spaghetti UI code, extracts cleanly scoped React components with defined prop interfaces.

skills.label: Dockerfile Optimizer
skills.method: Analyzes build context, rewrites to multi-stage builds, removes unused apt packages.
trigger_examples: shrinks image sizes, cutting aws bandwidth costs

skills.label: Db Migration Generator
skills.method: Compares Prisma/Django schema changes, writes the exact SQL UP/DOWN migration scripts.

skills.label: Openapi Spec Generator
skills.method: Scans backend routing files (Express/FastAPI), generates perfectly formatted Swagger/OpenAPI JSON.
trigger_examples: keeps frontend and backend teams perfectly synced

skills.label: Aws Cost Anomaly Killer
skills.method: Monitors CloudWatch, detects if a Lambda function is stuck in an infinite loop, halts execution.
